claim_ceiling: Recomputes a curated route-packet navigation benchmark over bounded public fixtures: recall and precision of selected artifacts against expected stable ids, forbidden-first-route checks, scent-term coverage, latency status against a per-task budget, and sufficiency/latency debt candidates. Each case carries a planted expectation, and the runner accepts a case only when the recomputation matches it; planted negative cases are rejected by recomputation. It is not a live private kernel run, not an embedding benchmark, not a universal navigation benchmark, and not release authority.
